_meta.description: Offboard an existing YeshID person: select them from the dropdown, set an offboarding date, choose a template, and submit.

person_name.description: Full name of the person to offboard (as it appears in the dropdown, e.g. 'Sarah Johnson')

offboard_date.description: ISO date string for the scheduled offboarding date (e.g. '2026-05-01'). If omitted, the date picker is left at default.

template.description: Offboarding workflow template name. Must match a template visible in the dropdown.

verificationStrategy.pre: perceive offboard form and confirm person dropdown and date field are ready
verificationStrategy.post: read snackbar, then navigate to /workflows and confirm a STAGED offboarding workflow for person_name appears
verificationStrategy.primaryVerification: confirmation_message contains 'offboard' AND staged_offboard_workflow contains person_name

notes: Person selector has no confirmed data-cy. cachedConfidence 0.6 — this target will likely need resolution on first run.
Vuetify autocomplete: type person_name into .v-autocomplete input, then click matching .v-list-item in the dropdown.
schedule-user-activator has only one instance on this form (unlike onboard which has two).
_meta.title: Offboard Person

person-selector._note: fallbackSelectors used because confidence < 0.85; person picker data-cy not confirmed in survey

chain.note: HOME START: Navigate to overview dashboard before performing action.
Confirm authenticated — username widget must be visible.
Navigate directly to the offboard person form.

chain.description: Verify offboard form is loaded; confirm person dropdown, date picker, and template selector are present
chain.note: Perceive before filling to confirm form is ready. Also use to locate person-selector if cachedSelector fails.
Type person name to filter autocomplete. Dropdown opens during typing.
500ms for Vuetify autocomplete to populate dropdown items.
Click autocomplete dropdown item containing person_name. Uses find(r => includes()) — whitelisted js pattern. Handles items that show name + email in textContent.
Open the date picker to set the offboarding date. Skip if no date provided.

chain.description: Locate the date input within the date picker dialog
chain.note: After clicking date activator, perceive to find the date entry field in the calendar dialog.
Click 'Offboard person' button to submit. Using click_text — cachedSelector was :has-text() (invalid CSS). [was: click submit-button]
Capture success or error message from snackbar.
VERIFICATION: Navigate to Workflows (staged/pending filter) to confirm offboarding workflow was created for {{person_name}}.
Read the workflows list. Verify a row containing '{{person_name}}' with type 'Offboarding' and status STAGED or PENDING is present.
HOME END: Return to overview after action completes.

chain.description: Independent confirmation: verify staged_offboard_workflow in Workflows list contains person_name with Offboarding status
